title: Slovakian Pancakes
description: Traditional Slovakian pancake recipe made with fermented dough and topped with a variety of ingredients.

ingredients.name: Fermented Dough
ingredients.notes: Use store-bought or homemade fermented dough

instructions: In a large bowl, combine the fermented dough, beaten egg, Slovakian milk, melted butter, and granulated sugar. Mix well.
Add the bread crumbs to the dough mixture and mix until a smooth batter forms.
Heat a non-stick pan or griddle over medium heat.
Drop the batter by spoonfuls onto the pan or griddle.
Cook the pancakes for 2-3 minutes, until bubbles appear on the surface and the edges start to dry.
Flip the pancakes and cook for another 1-2 minutes, until golden brown.
Serve the pancakes warm with fresh fruit and confectioners' sugar, if desired.
